articles.title: OpenAI and PwC collaborate to reimagine the office of the CFO
articles.summary: OpenAI and PwC are partnering to help enterprises use AI agents to automate finance workflows, improve forecasting, strengthen controls, and modernize the CFO function.

articles.title: How OpenAI delivers low-latency voice AI at scale
articles.summary: How OpenAI rebuilt its WebRTC stack to power real-time Voice AI with low latency, global scale, and seamless conversational turn-taking.

articles.title: Introducing Advanced Account Security
articles.summary: Introducing Advanced Account Security: phishing-resistant login, stronger recovery, and enhanced protections to safeguard sensitive data and prevent account takeover.

articles.title: Where the goblins came from
articles.summary: How goblin outputs spread in AI models: timeline, root cause, and fixes behind personality-driven quirks in GPT-5 behavior.

articles.title: Building the compute infrastructure for the Intelligence Age
articles.summary: OpenAI scales Stargate to build the compute infrastructure powering AGI, adding new data center capacity to meet growing AI demand.

articles.title: Cybersecurity in the Intelligence Age
articles.summary: OpenAI outlines a five-part action plan for strengthening cybersecurity in the Intelligence Age, focused on democratizing AI-powered cyber defense and protecting critical systems.
